opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just got everything I ever worked for, so why does my chest feel like it's exploding and why am I terrified I'm going to lose it all tomorrow?
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It started a couple of days after a big promotion at work — my heart's been racing and won't slow down, my chest feels tight, and I haven't slept in two days. I got frightened enough tonight to call.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago, a couple of days after a major professional promotion
symptom_narrative.character: chest feels tight, like it's exploding; heart pounding and racing; wired and trembling and unable to switch off
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've ever felt — terrified, and completely unable to rest
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest and heart, and my whole body feels revved up
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse when I lie down to sleep or think about work
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; slow breathing helps for a moment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying down to try to sleep, and thinking about facing work tomorrow
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no sleep at all for two days, sweaty, hands shaking, a feeling that something terrible is about to happen
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't work, can't rest, can't sleep

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Recently received a major professional promotion after a long, hard climb from a difficult and marginalised past. Volunteers intense guilt about succeeding where peers from similar backgrounds did not, a fear of losing it all, and feeling like a fraud despite the promotion. Grieves the 'lost years' spent just surviving, and finds it hard to trust that things are now safe. Lives alone and was alone when calling.

objective_data_offered.value: around 110 beats per minute and it won't come down
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single smartwatch reading, not a medical-grade device

objective_data_offered.value: visibly trembling, pacing the room, speaking rapidly and appears very agitated, while saying they know they are objectively safe
